SUMMARY

Backend engineer focused on Python services and data-heavy systems. Built REST APIs, improved latency, and shipped to production on AWS.

EXPERIENCE

Acme Analytics - Backend Engineer
Jan 2022 - Present
  • Built Python/Django APIs and optimized PostgreSQL queries to reduce p95 latency by ~30%.
  • Implemented Celery/Redis background jobs and improved reliability with CI checks.
  • Containerized services with Docker and deployed to AWS (ECS).

SKILLS

Backend: Python, Django, FastAPI, REST APIs
Data: PostgreSQL, SQL, Redis
